verses.text: Ni khat ni-in Topa' omna-ah vantung mite hong paikik uh a, Satan zong amaute lakah hong kihelin Topa' omna mahah hong pai hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “Koi lai panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Satan in Topa dawngin, “Leitung khempeuh a lu pan a taw dong vak kawikawi-in ka va phehlehna mun panin kong pai hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “Ka nasem Job na phawk hiam? A paubaanglo, a thutang, Pasian zahtakin gamtat hoihlo a pel, amah tawh a kibang midang leitungah omlo hi. Thu omlopi-in amah susia dingin kei nong kam pausak a, ahi zongin ama hoihna bangmah hem tuanlo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Satan in Topa dawngin, “Vun bek in vun mah leizo bek, ci-in paunak a om mah bangin mi khat in ama nuntakna a hutna-in a neih khempeuh pia ngam ding hi
Tu-in na khut zan in la, ama sa leh a guh suksak lecin nangma maitang mahah pelloin nang hong samsia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “En in, na khutsungah amah kong ap hi; ahi zongin amah sisak kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' omna panin Satan paikhia a, Job a khetul pan a luzang dongin a kihhuai meima a veisak hi
Tua ciangin Job in beel kitam themkhat la-in tua tawh kikhuatin vut lakah a tu hi
Tua ciangin a zi in, “Na upna khiam tuanlo ding na hi hiam? Pasian samsia in la sisuk mai in,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin amah in a zi kiangah, “Numei haite' kampau bangin na pau hi. Pasian' tung panin a hoih sang ihih ciangin siatna zong sanglo ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi. Hih thu khempeuhah a kampau nangawnin Job khiallo hi

Job' lawmte thum, Teman khuami Elifaz, Shuah gammi Bildad, leh Naamah gammi Zofar-te in Job in a thuak gimna thu teng a zak uh ciangin a inn ciat panun amah a hehnem ding leh a hanthawn dingin kituahin hong paikhawm uh hi
Amaute in a gamla sim mun panin Job a muh tungun amah thei pahlo uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute a gingin kapkhia uh a, a puan uh balkekin a lu tung uh a tukik dingin leivui lawnto uh hi
Tua ciangin leilakah sun sagih leh zan sagih sung amah tawh tukhawm uh a, ama thuakna a nasiat mahmah lamtak mu uh ahih manin kuamah in kam khat beek a paupih ngam kei uh hi.
